title: Oct2020: \d shows empty result in schema created by include sql script
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'test_schema' AND TABLE_NAME = 'test_table';
key_bug_features: Empty result from sys.var() in specific schema
